title: rubus fissus
intro: Rubus fissus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like ellagic acid and gallic acid. The health benefits of Rubus fissus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and have anti-cancer properties. Rubus fissus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
